ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cpi_series" (
  "series_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each CPI series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the CPI series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CPI series */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the CPI series */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the CPI series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_series_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_series_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpi_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Reference to the CPI series */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the data (e.g., M01 for January) */,
  "value" REAL /* CPI value for the period */,
  "one_month_percent_change" REAL /* One-month percent change in CPI */,
  "one_year_percent_change" REAL /* One-year percent change in CPI */,
  "five_year_percent_change" REAL /* Five-year percent change in CPI */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the CPI data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the CPI data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES cpi_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_data_period FOREIGN KEY ("period") REFERENCES periods ("period"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which CPI data is available */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period (month) for which CPI data is available */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private, research) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data was updated by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the CPI category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_weight" REAL /* Weight of the category in the CPI calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Reference to the CPI series accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the data */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES cpi_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, comparison, summary) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the CPI data used for the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart, pie chart) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the visualization file (if stored as a file) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the visualization file (e.g., PNG, SVG) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES cpi_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
